mapper.sql: b.binding_id as source_binding_id, b.source_scope, b.source_sku_group_key, b.source_dimension_group_key, b.master_sku, b.master_product_name_snapshot, b.source_payload_hash, b.wms_payload_hash, b.measure_length_cm, b.measure_width_cm, b.measure_height_cm, b.measure_weight_kg, b.measure_source, b.source_warehouse_names, b.source_warehouse_count, b.binding_status, b.lock_status, b.locked_time
left join product_sku_source_binding b on b.sku_id = sk.sku_id and b.binding_status = 'ACTIVE'

latest_review.review_id as latest_review_id, latest_review.review_no as latest_review_no, latest_review.review_status as latest_review_status, latest_review.review_reason as latest_review_feedback, latest_review.review_time as latest_review_time

left join ( select r.review_id, r.review_no, r.review_status, r.review_reason, r.review_time, r.spu_id from product_review_request r inner join ( select spu_id, max(review_id) as review_id from product_review_request where del_flag = '0' group by spu_id ) latest on latest.review_id = r.review_id ) latest_review on latest_review.spu_id = p.spu_id

if.test: latestReviewStatus != null and latestReviewStatus != '' and latestReviewStatus != 'NONE'

mapper.sql: spu_inventory.platform_available_qty as available_stock, spu_inventory.warehouse_count as warehouse_count, spu_inventory.inventory_status as inventory_status, spu_inventory.latest_stock_update_time as stock_update_time
left join inventory_overview_spu_read_model spu_inventory on spu_inventory.spu_id = p.spu_id

sku_inventory.platform_available_qty as available_stock, sku_inventory.warehouse_count as warehouse_count, sku_inventory.inventory_status as inventory_status, sku_inventory.latest_stock_update_time as stock_update_time
left join inventory_overview_sku_read_model sku_inventory on sku_inventory.sku_id = sk.sku_id

select p.*, ifnull(s.sku_count, 0) as sku_count, s.supply_price_min, s.supply_price_max, s.sale_price_min, s.sale_price_max, s.currency_summary, wh.warehouse_kind_summary,
from product_spu p left join ( select spu_id, count(1) as sku_count, min(supply_price) as supply_price_min, max(supply_price) as supply_price_max, min(sale_price) as sale_price_min, max(sale_price) as sale_price_max, case when count(distinct currency_code) = 1 then min(currency_code) else 'MULTI' end as currency_summary from product_sku where del_flag = '0' and control_status = 'NORMAL' group by spu_id ) s on s.spu_id = p.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = p.spu_id

select p.*, ifnull(s.sku_count, 0) as sku_count, s.supply_price_min, s.supply_price_max, s.sale_price_min, s.sale_price_max, s.currency_summary, wh.warehouse_kind_summary, ,
from product_spu p left join ( select spu_id, count(1) as sku_count, min(supply_price) as supply_price_min, max(supply_price) as supply_price_max, min(sale_price) as sale_price_min, max(sale_price) as sale_price_max, case when count(distinct currency_code) = 1 then min(currency_code) else 'MULTI' end as currency_summary from product_sku where del_flag = '0' and control_status = 'NORMAL' group by spu_id ) s on s.spu_id = p.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = p.spu_id

select p.*, s.sku_count, null as supply_price_min, null as supply_price_max, s.sale_price_min, s.sale_price_max, s.currency_summary, wh.warehouse_kind_summary,
from product_spu p inner join ( select spu_id, count(1) as sku_count, min(sale_price) as sale_price_min, max(sale_price) as sale_price_max, case when count(distinct currency_code) = 1 then min(currency_code) else 'MULTI' end as currency_summary from product_sku where del_flag = '0' and sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and control_status = 'NORMAL' group by spu_id ) s on s.spu_id = p.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = p.spu_id
mapper.select:
where p.del_flag = '0' and p.spu_status = 'ON_SALE' and p.control_status = 'NORMAL'
and ( p.system_spu_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.product_name_en like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.selling_point like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or exists ( select 1 from product_sku sk where sk.spu_id = p.spu_id and sk.del_flag = '0' and sk.sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and sk.control_status = 'NORMAL' and sk.system_sku_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
and p.system_spu_code like concat('%', #{systemSpuCode}, '%')
and exists ( select 1 from product_sku sk where sk.spu_id = p.spu_id and sk.del_flag = '0' and sk.sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and sk.control_status = 'NORMAL' and sk.system_sku_code like concat('%', #{systemSkuCode}, '%') )
and p.product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
and p.product_name_en like concat('%', #{productNameEn}, '%')
and p.category_id = #{categoryId}
order by p.update_time desc, p.spu_id desc
where p.spu_id = #{spuId} and p.del_flag = '0' and p.spu_status = 'ON_SALE' and p.control_status = 'NORMAL' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into product_spu( system_spu_code, seller_spu_code, seller_id, seller_no, seller_name, category_id, category_code, category_name, product_name, product_name_en, selling_point, main_image_url, detail_content, spu_status, control_status, control_reason, source_type, source_ref_type, source_ref_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{systemSpuCode}, #{sellerSpuCode}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerNo}, #{sellerName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{productName}, #{productNameEn}, #{sellingPoint}, #{mainImageUrl}, #{detailContent}, #{spuStatus}, #{controlStatus}, #{controlReason}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefType}, #{sourceRefId}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update product_spu set seller_spu_code = #{sellerSpuCode}, seller_id = #{sellerId}, seller_no = #{sellerNo}, seller_name = #{sellerName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, category_name = #{categoryName}, product_name = #{productName}, product_name_en = #{productNameEn}, selling_point = #{sellingPoint}, main_image_url = #{mainImageUrl}, detail_content = #{detailContent}, spu_status = #{spuStatus}, control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{controlReason}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_spu set spu_status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'

update product_spu set control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{reason},
control_by = #{updateBy}, control_time = sysdate(),
recover_by = #{updateBy}, recover_time = sysdate(),
update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_spu set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
select sk.*, p.system_spu_code, p.seller_spu_code, p.seller_name, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.product_name, p.product_name_en, p.spu_status, p.control_status as spu_control_status, wh.warehouse_kind_summary, ,
from product_sku sk left join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = sk.spu_id
where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, sku_id asc

select sk.*, p.system_spu_code, p.seller_spu_code, p.seller_name, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.product_name, p.product_name_en, p.spu_status, p.control_status as spu_control_status, wh.warehouse_kind_summary, ,
from product_sku sk left join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = sk.spu_id
where sk.spu_id in
#{spuId}
and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sk.spu_id asc, sk.sort_order asc, sk.sku_id asc

select sk.*, p.system_spu_code, p.seller_spu_code, p.seller_name, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.product_name, p.product_name_en, p.spu_status, p.control_status as spu_control_status, wh.warehouse_kind_summary, ,
from product_sku sk left join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = sk.spu_id
where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.seller_id = #{sellerId} and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, sku_id asc

select sk.*, p.system_spu_code, p.seller_spu_code, p.seller_name, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.product_name, p.product_name_en, p.spu_status, p.control_status as spu_control_status, wh.warehouse_kind_summary, ,
from product_sku sk left join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = sk.spu_id
where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and sk.control_status = 'NORMAL' and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, sku_id asc

select sk.*, p.system_spu_code, p.seller_spu_code, p.seller_name, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.product_name, p.product_name_en, p.spu_status, p.control_status as spu_control_status, wh.warehouse_kind_summary, ,
from product_sku sk left join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = sk.spu_id
where sk.spu_id in
#{spuId}
and sk.sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and sk.control_status = 'NORMAL' and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sk.spu_id asc, sk.sort_order asc, sk.sku_id asc

select sk.*, p.system_spu_code, p.seller_spu_code, p.seller_name, p.category_id, p.category_name, p.product_name, p.product_name_en, p.spu_status, p.control_status as spu_control_status, wh.warehouse_kind_summary, ,
from product_sku sk left join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id left join ( select spu_id, case when count(distinct warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end as warehouse_kind_summary from product_spu_warehouse group by spu_id ) wh on wh.spu_id = sk.spu_id
where sk.sku_id = #{skuId} and sk.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into product_sku( spu_id, seller_id, system_sku_code, seller_sku_code, color, size, length_value, width_value, height_value, weight, material, style, model, package_quantity, capacity, sku_image_url, supply_price, sale_price, currency_code, sku_status, control_status, control_reason, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{spuId}, #{sellerId}, #{systemSkuCode}, #{sellerSkuCode}, #{color}, #{size}, #{lengthValue}, #{widthValue}, #{heightValue}, #{weight}, #{material}, #{style}, #{model}, #{packageQuantity}, #{capacity}, #{skuImageUrl}, #{supplyPrice}, #{salePrice}, #{currencyCode}, #{skuStatus}, #{controlStatus}, #{controlReason}, #{sortOrder}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update product_sku set seller_id = #{sellerId}, seller_sku_code = #{sellerSkuCode}, color = #{color}, size = #{size}, length_value = #{lengthValue}, width_value = #{widthValue}, height_value = #{heightValue}, weight = #{weight}, material = #{material}, style = #{style}, model = #{model}, package_quantity = #{packageQuantity}, capacity = #{capacity}, sku_image_url = #{skuImageUrl}, supply_price = #{supplyPrice}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, currency_code = #{currencyCode}, sku_status = #{skuStatus}, control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{controlReason}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where sku_id = #{skuId} and spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set sku_status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and del_flag = '0'

update product_sku set control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{reason},
control_by = #{updateBy}, control_time = sysdate(),
recover_by = #{updateBy}, recover_time = sysdate(),
update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set sale_price = #{salePrice}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set supply_price = #{supplyPrice}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from product_sku where spu_id = #{spuId} and sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and control_status = 'NORMAL' and del_flag = '0'
select * from product_attribute_value where spu_id = #{spuId} order by value_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into product_attribute_value( owner_type, owner_id, spu_id, category_id, category_schema_version, attribute_id, attribute_code, attribute_name, attribute_type, value_code, value_text, value_number, value_date, value_json, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{spuId}, #{categoryId}, #{categorySchemaVersion}, #{attributeId}, #{attributeCode}, #{attributeName}, #{attributeType}, #{valueCode}, #{valueText}, #{valueNumber}, #{valueDate}, #{valueJson}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.select: select * from product_image where spu_id = #{spuId} order by sort_order asc, image_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into product_image( owner_type, owner_id, spu_id, sku_id, image_url, image_role, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageRole}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select id, spu_id, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_kind, settlement_currency, seller_id, create_by, create_time from product_spu_warehouse where spu_id = #{spuId} order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into product_spu_warehouse( spu_id, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_kind, settlement_currency, seller_id, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{spuId}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{warehouseKind}, #{settlementCurrency}, #{sellerId}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select * from product_sku_source_binding where sku_id = #{skuId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE' limit 1

select * from product_sku_source_binding where binding_status = 'ACTIVE' and sku_id in
#{skuId}
select * from product_sku_source_binding where source_sku_group_key = #{sourceSkuGroupKey} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE' limit 1

select * from product_sku_source_binding where binding_status = 'ACTIVE' and source_sku_group_key in
#{sourceSkuGroupKey}
select sku_id from product_sku where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0' order by sku_id asc

select sk.spu_id as spuId, sk.sku_id as skuId, sk.seller_id as sellerId, p.seller_no as sellerNo, p.seller_name as sellerName, p.system_spu_code as systemSpuCode, p.seller_spu_code as sellerSpuCode, sk.system_sku_code as systemSkuCode, sk.seller_sku_code as sellerSkuCode, p.product_name as productName, p.product_name_en as productNameEn, p.main_image_url as mainImageUrl, sk.sku_image_url as skuImageUrl, sk.color, sk.size, sk.model from product_sku sk join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id and p.del_flag = '0' where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sk.sku_id asc

select b.sku_id as skuId, b.source_scope as sourceScope, b.master_sku as masterSku, b.master_product_name_snapshot as masterProductName from product_sku sk join product_spu p on p.spu_id = sk.spu_id and p.del_flag = '0' join product_sku_source_binding b on b.sku_id = sk.sku_id and b.binding_status = 'ACTIVE' where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.del_flag = '0' order by b.sku_id asc, b.source_scope asc, b.master_sku asc, b.master_product_name_snapshot asc

select pw.spu_id as spuId, pw.warehouse_id as warehouseId, pw.warehouse_kind as warehouseKind, pw.warehouse_code as warehouseCode, pw.warehouse_name as warehouseName from product_spu_warehouse pw join product_spu p on p.spu_id = pw.spu_id and p.del_flag = '0' where pw.spu_id = #{spuId} order by pw.warehouse_kind asc, pw.warehouse_id asc

select distinct b.source_scope as sourceScope, b.master_sku as masterSku, b.master_product_name_snapshot as masterProductName from product_sku sk join product_sku_source_binding b on b.sku_id = sk.sku_id and b.binding_status = 'ACTIVE' where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.del_flag = '0' order by b.source_scope asc, b.master_sku asc, b.master_product_name_snapshot asc
mapper.insert: insert into product_sku_source_binding( spu_id, sku_id, seller_id, system_sku_code, source_scope, source_sku_group_key, source_dimension_group_key, master_sku, master_product_name_snapshot, system_sku_name_snapshot, seller_name_snapshot, source_payload_hash, wms_payload_hash, measure_length_cm, measure_width_cm, measure_height_cm, measure_weight_kg, measure_source, currency_code, source_warehouse_names, source_warehouse_count, binding_status, lock_status, locked_time, locked_by, release_reason, replace_reason, active_sku_key, active_source_key, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{sellerId}, #{systemSkuCode}, #{sourceScope}, #{sourceSkuGroupKey}, #{sourceDimensionGroupKey}, #{masterSku}, #{masterProductNameSnapshot}, #{systemSkuNameSnapshot}, #{sellerNameSnapshot}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, #{wmsPayloadHash}, #{measureLengthCm}, #{measureWidthCm}, #{measureHeightCm}, #{measureWeightKg}, #{measureSource}, #{currencyCode}, #{sourceWarehouseNames}, #{sourceWarehouseCount}, #{bindingStatus}, #{lockStatus}, #{lockedTime}, #{lockedBy}, #{releaseReason}, #{replaceReason}, #{activeSkuKey}, #{activeSourceKey}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update product_sku_source_binding set seller_id = #{sellerId}, system_sku_code = #{systemSkuCode}, source_scope = #{sourceScope}, source_sku_group_key = #{sourceSkuGroupKey}, source_dimension_group_key = #{sourceDimensionGroupKey}, master_sku = #{masterSku}, master_product_name_snapshot = #{masterProductNameSnapshot}, system_sku_name_snapshot = #{systemSkuNameSnapshot}, seller_name_snapshot = #{sellerNameSnapshot}, source_payload_hash = #{sourcePayloadHash}, wms_payload_hash = #{wmsPayloadHash}, measure_length_cm = #{measureLengthCm}, measure_width_cm = #{measureWidthCm}, measure_height_cm = #{measureHeightCm}, measure_weight_kg = #{measureWeightKg}, measure_source = #{measureSource}, currency_code = #{currencyCode}, source_warehouse_names = #{sourceWarehouseNames}, source_warehouse_count = #{sourceWarehouseCount}, lock_status = #{lockStatus}, locked_time = #{lockedTime}, locked_by = #{lockedBy}, active_sku_key = #{activeSkuKey}, active_source_key = #{activeSourceKey}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where binding_id = #{bindingId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE'

update product_sku_source_binding set binding_status = 'REPLACED', replace_reason = #{reason}, active_sku_key = null, active_source_key = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where binding_id = #{bindingId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE'

update product_sku_source_binding set binding_status = 'RELEASED', release_reason = #{reason}, active_sku_key = null, active_source_key = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE'

update product_sku_source_binding set lock_status = 'LOCKED', locked_time = sysdate(), locked_by = #{lockedBy}, update_by = #{lockedBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and binding_status = 'ACTIVE' and lock_status <> 'LOCKED'
